parts.text:
{
  "mission_codename": "OPERATION GHOSTLY SILENCE",
  "target": "Our primary objective is the legendary Aurum Archive, a fortress of rare artifacts and forgotten histories, rumored to hold secrets worth more than any mere coin.",
  "location_flavor": "This heist takes place under the cloak of a perpetually moonless night, a brief window opening just before dawn when the city's automated patrols cycle their power.",
  "antagonist_move": "Inspector Vega has just deployed new experimental sensor grids around all major financial hubs, making her presence felt even before she arrives on scene.",
  "briefing_text": "The city sleeps, but its treasures do not. This is your chance to make a name, to carve out a legend from the shadows. The Aurum Archive is more than just a vault; it's a statement, and cracking it will announce your arrival to every major player in this clandestine world. The challenge is immense, the reward immeasurable, but a single misstep could lead to eternal obscurity.",
  "mission_hook": "The Archive's internal security system uses a neural network that adapts to observed patterns, meaning the same approach won't work twice."
}
